channel.title: al4f.dev
channel.description: Architecture notes and build logs on Agent Skills engineering by al4f.

item.title: Agent Skills at Scale: Why You Need a Build Pipeline
item.description: Why a source-to-dist build step matters when authoring Agent Skills at scale.

item.title: How I Built skill-auditor in skills-house
item.description: A walkthrough of authoring a second reference skill in the skills-house monorepo.

item.title: Authoring Conventions I'd Propose for Agent Skills v2
item.description: Constructive proposals for the Agent Skills specification based on skills-house learnings.

item.title: RFC: skills-house Distribution Model
item.description: Public RFC for npx skills add and per-skill npm distribution.
